## 变更说明
<!-- 这个 PR 做了什么?为什么? -->

## 变更类型
- [ ] feat(新功能)
- [ ] fix(修复)
- [ ] docs(文档)
- [ ] refactor(重构)
- [ ] chore(杂项)

## 涉及模块
- [ ] apps/tavern
- [ ] apps/platform
- [ ] packages/core
- [ ] packages/shared
- [ ] packages/worker-cloudflare
- [ ] packages/scf-tencent
- [ ] packages/deploy-agent
- [ ] docs

## 自检
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` 通过
- [ ] 改动的前端 `npm run build` 通过
- [ ] 若改了 `@minist/shared` 路由/加密,已同步 `packages/scf-tencent/src/constants.js`
- [ ] 示例内容保持 SFW
- [ ] 已更新相关文档(如有)
